fields.name: NAV Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the record in Business Central to couple to an existing Dataverse record.

fields.name: CRM Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the record in Dataverse that is coupled to the record in Business Central.

fields.name: Sync Action
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to synchronize the data in the record in Business Central and the record in Dataverse.

fields.name: Create New
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a new record in Dataverse is automatically created and coupled to the related record in Business Central.
